layers.name: background_paper
layers.description: The base layer of the artwork, an off-white, slightly textured paper canvas, providing the foundation for the ink painting.
layers.regeneration_prompt: A blank, slightly textured off-white rice paper canvas, traditional Chinese painting style.

layers.name: distant_mountains
layers.description: Majestic, dark, and misty mountains rendered with varying shades of black ink washes, forming the rugged peaks in the far background, partially obscured by mist.
layers.regeneration_prompt: Distant, towering mountains in traditional Chinese ink wash painting style, rendered with dark grey and black ink, partially obscured by mist, on a transparent background.

layers.name: mist_and_clouds
layers.description: Soft, ethereal white and light grey mist and clouds that drift between the mountain peaks and through the valleys, creating a sense of depth and atmosphere.
layers.regeneration_prompt: Ethereal white and light grey mist and clouds, traditional Chinese ink wash painting style, flowing through a landscape, on a transparent background.

layers.name: midground_landscape
layers.description: The detailed midground landscape featuring green-tinted rocky hills, dense dark green forests, a winding river with white waterfalls, and a narrow stone path.
layers.regeneration_prompt: A midground landscape in traditional Chinese ink wash painting style, featuring green-tinted rocky hills, dense dark green forests, a winding river with white waterfalls, and a narrow stone path, on a transparent background.

layers.name: pavilion_and_pine_trees
layers.description: A small, traditional wooden pavilion with a distinctive roof, nestled on a prominent hill, surrounded by gnarled, ancient pine trees with dark green needles.
layers.regeneration_prompt: A small, traditional Chinese wooden pavilion with a distinctive roof, surrounded by gnarled, ancient pine trees with dark green needles, in traditional ink wash painting style, on a transparent background.

layers.name: calligraphy_and_seals
layers.description: Black ink calligraphy characters arranged vertically in the upper right corner, accompanied by two small, square red seals.
layers.regeneration_prompt: Traditional Chinese black ink calligraphy characters arranged vertically, with two small square red seals, in the upper right corner, on a transparent background.
